rounds.features: Puzzle mode (5 levels), 2 new enemy types (patrol + teleporter), 50 achievements (up from 40), Pause panel, Achievements panel, Power-ups HUD, Level transition panel, high score persistence (localStorage), neon arena border walls, enemy death particles, teleport effects, fuse spark animation, combo sound feedback, exit tiles for puzzle mode, enemy HP system, fastest/survival time tracking, save settings

Environmental hazards: laser beams (warning+fire cycle, damage player/enemies, row/col patterns), conveyor belts (push entities), danger zone indicators (show bomb blast radius preview), score multiplier system (kills build x1-x8 multi), player trail effect (fading cyan trail), starfield background (120 animated stars), How to Play panel with controls/tips, expanded to 60 achievements (Quad Damage, Octakill, Laser Dodger, etc.), laser/conveyor/multiplier SFX, improved HUD with multiplier display

Bomb kick mechanic (BombKick power-up, sliding bomb physics), warp portals (paired teleport tiles from level 5+, cooldown system), score popup floating numbers (visual feedback for kills/blocks), achievement unlock notifications (head-locked PanelUI panel with sound), power-up collection particle burst effect, 70 achievements (5 new: Kick Start/Warp Drive/Half Million/Hex Damage/Transcendent), 10 PanelUI panels, ASCII-clean glyphs

BFS pathfinding for chase/boss enemies, Endless mode (5th game mode - infinite escalating waves with boss every 5 waves), 2 new power-ups (Time Freeze slows enemies to 20%%, Magnet auto-collects nearby power-ups), screen flash effects on player hit/wave clear, dynamic time freeze visual overlay, career stats expanded, 80 achievements (10 new: Frozen in Time/Magnetic Personality/Wave 5/Wave Rider/Tsunami/Jack of All Trades/Multi Kill/Boss Hunter/Millionaire/Extermination)

Splitter enemy type (splits into 2 fast wanderers on death, 2 HP, from level 7+), ice patches (slide mechanic from level 6+, translucent blue pulsing tiles), statistics panel (full career stats, per-mode best scores), theme-responsive ambient music (5 bass tuning profiles), per-mode best scores (localStorage), 90 achievements (10 new: splitter_kill, splitter_5, ice_slide, level_30, combo_25, survive_20min, total_2m, blocks_5000, powerups_50, endless_w30), 11 PanelUI panels (stats added)

Level modifier system (7 types: Power Surge/Dense Arena/Speed Zone/Bomb Rain/Double Loot/Glass Cannon/Volatile, from level 3+, 60% chance), Mine power-up (10th type, flat disc visual, detonates on enemy contact), modifier HUD indicator, modifier shown on level transition, mine indicator on HUD, How To Play updated with mine/modifier tips, stats panel shows mine data, 100 achievements (10 new: Minelayer/Trap Master/Demolitionist/Modified/Adapt and Overcome/Living Dangerously/Quick Fuse/Genocide II/Pentamillionaire/Veteran Player)
